heading: Preservation of remedies
label: 4043 Preservation of remedies
text: Nothing in section 4041 or 4042 of this title shall be construed to preclude or limit any remedy otherwise available under other law, including consequential and punitive damages.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 597b of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
